tool.name: Mac Shell Command
tool.description: Execute a shell command on the Mac. Dangerous commands are blocked for security.

ai.systemPromptSection:
### mac_shell
Execute a shell command on the Mac.

**Format:**
```tool_request
{"tool": "mac_shell", "query": "{\"command\": \"ls -la\"}"}
```

**Parameters:**
- command: Shell command to execute (required)
- timeout: Timeout in ms (default: 30000)
- workingDirectory: Working directory (optional)

**Returns:** success, stdout, stderr, exitCode, timedOut, blocked, blockedReason

**Security:** Dangerous commands (rm -rf, sudo, etc.) are blocked.
whenToUse: User explicitly asks to run a command
Need to execute a specific terminal command
whenNotToUse: Can be done with safer file/app tools
User didn't explicitly request command execution
